parsedJson.summary: The mobile page has clear roofing messaging and phone visibility, but the desktop screenshot shows a 403 error and the mobile hero feels cramped and trust-light.

issues.title: Desktop page is blocked
issues.what_observed: The desktop screenshot shows a full-page light blue error screen with the centered text '403 - Forbidden' and 'Access to this page is forbidden.'
issues.why_problem: A local customer searching for a roofer on a laptop would think the business website is broken or unsafe, then go back to Google and choose another company.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A working desktop homepage with the business name, service area, phone number, emergency roofing message, review proof, and a quote/call button visible above the fold.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Fix the server access issue first, then replace the error page with a responsive homepage hero that loads correctly on desktop and shows the primary phone CTA immediately.
issues.plain_explanation: 电脑端打开网站时看到的是“403禁止访问”错误页，不是正常的公司首页。
issues.customer_impact: 这会直接丢客户。很多人在Google上点开网站后，如果页面打不开，几秒内就会返回搜索结果找下一家；这类错误基本等于把桌面端询盘全部浪费掉。

issues.title: Primary call button is split
issues.what_observed: On the mobile screenshot, the orange 'Call 0427 364 223' button at the bottom is only partly visible, with the lower part cut off by the screenshot edge.
issues.why_problem: A phone-searching customer in a hurry may not immediately see a complete action button, especially if they are looking for emergency help and want one obvious tap target.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A sticky bottom call bar or a fully visible hero CTA with at least 44px height, clear phone icon, and enough spacing from the screen edge.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Add a persistent mobile bottom bar with a phone icon and 'Call 0427 364 223', and keep a second full-width orange call button fully visible inside the first screen.
issues.plain_explanation: 手机页面最重要的拨打电话按钮露出来不完整，看起来像被截断了。
issues.customer_impact: 本地服务搜索大多数发生在手机上，客户通常想马上打电话。按钮不够明显会减少来电，尤其是屋顶漏水这类紧急需求，客户会直接打给更容易联系的竞争对手。

issues.title: Hero copy feels cramped
issues.what_observed: The mobile hero places a large 'Sydney Roofing Specialists' heading, a long paragraph, a large Google rating graphic, and a call button all in one narrow vertical area.
issues.why_problem: A local customer scanning quickly has to work too hard to understand the offer, proof, and next step because the first screen is visually crowded.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A shorter mobile hero with one clear headline, one 1-2 line benefit statement, visible call button, and review proof placed below with breathing room.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Rewrite the hero paragraph to one short line such as 'Roof repairs, replacements and emergency roofing across Sydney', then move the longer explanation below the first CTA.
issues.plain_explanation: 手机首页第一屏塞了太多文字和元素，客户一眼看过去会觉得拥挤。
issues.customer_impact: 访客通常会在几秒内判断要不要继续看。信息太挤会让人跳过重点，少点电话按钮，Google商家资料带来的访问也更容易流失。

issues.title: Hero image lacks local proof
issues.what_observed: The mobile hero background shows a darkened close-up roofing/gutter image but no visible Sydney job, team member, branded vehicle, or completed roof project.
issues.why_problem: Roofing is a high-trust purchase, and a generic-looking background does not prove the company is real, local, or experienced with Sydney homes.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A bright, real project photo showing a completed roof, team member, or branded ute, with a dark overlay only strong enough to keep white text readable.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the hero background with an authentic Sydney roofing job photo and add a small visual trust strip below it showing licensed/insured, emergency availability, and review count.
issues.plain_explanation: 首页大图看起来像普通屋顶素材图，没有体现这是悉尼本地真实公司。
issues.customer_impact: 修屋顶客单价高，客户会先判断这家公司靠不靠谱。缺少真实项目照片会降低信任，特别是从Google点进来的陌生客户更容易选择有真实案例的商家。

issues.title: Rating lacks review count
issues.what_observed: The mobile hero shows a large Google '5.0 Google Rating' graphic with five stars, but no visible number of reviews or link-style proof.
issues.why_problem: A 5.0 rating is less convincing if visitors cannot see whether it comes from 3 reviews or 300 reviews, so the trust signal can feel incomplete.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A compact review badge that says '5.0 stars from X Google reviews' with the star row and a link or button to view reviews.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Update the rating block to include the live review count and place it near the CTA as a smaller trust badge rather than a huge graphic.
issues.plain_explanation: 页面写了Google 5.0评分，但没有显示有多少条评价。
issues.customer_impact: 客户会怀疑这个评分有多可信。5星但只有少量评价说服力有限；显示评价数量通常能提高陌生客户拨电话的信心。

issues.title: Header uses space heavily
issues.what_observed: The mobile screenshot has a tall black header with a large SRS logo on the left and a hamburger icon on the right, followed by a separate full-width orange call bar.
issues.why_problem: The top area consumes valuable mobile space before the visitor reaches the main message, making the first screen feel heavier than necessary.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A slimmer mobile header with a smaller logo, phone icon/button on the right, and menu icon secondary; the emergency call CTA can remain sticky at the bottom.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Reduce the logo/header height, combine the phone action into a compact header button or sticky bottom call bar, and let the hero content start higher.
issues.plain_explanation: 手机顶部的黑色Logo区域偏高，占用了太多首屏空间。
issues.customer_impact: 手机屏幕很小，顶部占得越多，客户越晚看到服务内容和信任信息。对于本地搜索流量，越快看到“能解决我的问题”和“怎么联系”，越容易产生来电。

positive_observations: The mobile page clearly states 'Sydney Roofing Specialists' in the first screen.
The phone number is visible in the orange call bar near the top of mobile.
The Google rating graphic is prominent and worth preserving in a more credible format.
redesign_priorities: 1. Fix the desktop 403 error and make the homepage load normally on laptop screens.
2. Rebuild the mobile hero around one clear headline, one complete call button, and concise local service proof.
3. Replace generic trust visuals with real project photos, review count, and licensed/insured emergency-service trust badges.
